title: Address
description: A postal address with country and optional structured fields.

id.description: Unique identifier for the address within the resource.

firstName.description: First name of the address recipient.

lastName.description: Last name of the address recipient.

streetName.description: Street name component of the address.

streetNumber.description: Street number component of the address.

postalCode.description: Postal or ZIP code of the address.

region.description: Region, state, or province of the address.

email.description: Email address associated with this postal address.

phone.description: Phone number associated with this postal address.
